title: SkyDeck.ai Security
description: Create, Curate, and Control with SkyDeck.ai. SOC 2 Type 2 attested and CASA Tier 2 verified.
lede: SkyDeck AI Inc. prioritizes security, with SOC 2 Type 1 & Type 2 attestation reports and CASA Tier 2 verification for our SkyDeck.ai Platform and Rememberizer service.
html:
System and Organization Controls

SOC 2 TYPE 2

The SOC 2 framework includes 64 distinct requirements organized under five Trust Services Criteria (TSC), which provide the basis for assessing an organization's controls. These criteria are divided into Security Controls and Privacy Controls.

SkyDeck AI Inc. completed its SOC 2 Type 1 examination in January 2024 and its SOC 2 Type 2 examination in June 2024, each resulting in an independent auditor's report.

Request our SOC 2 report

Cloud Application Security Assessment

CASA Tier 2 certified

The Tier 2 CASA is aligned to the OWASP Application Security Verification Standard (ASVS) v4.0. There are 134 requirements in total, with each mapped to its own set of acceptance criteria.

The Rememberizer Service achieved CASA Tier 2 Certification in April 2024.

Learn more
